returns.count: Number of skills (active or not) authored by this address.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.ipfsCid: IPFS content identifier for the skill package.
params.name: Human-readable name.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.newIpfsCid: New IPFS CID (pass empty string to keep current).

params.successRate: New success rate in basis points.

authorSkillCount(address).notice: Count of skills published by a given author.

creatorOf(bytes32).notice: Get the creator of a skill.

deactivateSkill(bytes32).notice: Permanently deactivate a skill. Creator or contract owner.

isActive(bytes32).notice: Check if a skill exists and is active.

priceOf(bytes32).notice: Get the price of a skill.

updateSkill(bytes32,string,uint256).notice: Update a skill's CID and/or price. Creator only. Bumps version.

updateStats(bytes32,uint256,uint256).notice: Update validation statistics for a skill. Only callable by owner         (which should be set to ValidationRegistry or a router).
